steps.title: Identify the crucial relationship the hypothesis requires
steps.content: The hypothesis depends on an intermediate step: shark decline must lead to ray increase (since sharks eat rays). We need evidence confirming that when sharks decrease, rays increase.

steps.title: Find which choice confirms that relationship
steps.content:
D shows the required relationship: rays increased as sharks decreased.
  • A addresses unrelated prey
  • B contradicts by showing oysters thrive where rays are present
  • C shows the wrong timing
. That matches choice D — D is correct.
